title: Vantage
description: A Material You e-commerce SPA built with Vite/React, featuring a robust Vitest suite for guaranteed frontend reliability.

title: CVmaker
description: High-fidelity resume builder generating 100% ATS-friendly PDFs with dynamic subsections and professional templates.

title: BattleShip
description: TDD-engineered naval combat game featuring a custom 'Hunt and Target' AI and retro GBA-style graphics.

title: Algorithm Visualizer
description: Fluid algorithm visualizer using requestAnimationFrame for high-performance animations of searching and sorting.

title: DoTODO
description: Terminal-themed task manager built with modular architecture and SOLID principles for clean, maintainable code.

title: Message Board
description: Full-stack MVC message board with persistent data storage using Express.js and PostgreSQL, with validation via express-validator.
